Exploring: reference normalization

The normalization layer converts a provider's raw entity data into Evo-Lite's
unified reference shape. The entry point lives at templates/cli/code-perception/normalize.js:54,
which fans out to the enum-coercion and id-derivation helpers. Search results
and impact results reuse the same reference builder, so a single change here
ripples across the whole perception surface. The native fallback fabricates no
symbol graph; this path stays pure and deterministic. Callers that need callee
detail should follow the trail from the entry point rather than re-deriving it.
